calendar.matters:
APPEAL OF CRIMINAL JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Sep-05-2017 Affirmed
MINI MINUTES: Appellate Hearing June 18, 2017 at 2pm in D622
Residing Judge Jeffrey S. Ross, Associate Judge Linda Colfax, and Associate Judge Michael I. Begert are presiding; Clerk J. Kong

No Appearance by Appellant's Counsel
Counsel Brian Bringardner Present for Respondent, People.
WENDE BRIEF

San Francisco Superior Court Judge Jeffrey S. Ross disclosed at argument that-after Bradford's conviction, but before his sentencing-Bradford was referred to the Veteran's Justice Court ("VJC"), a collaborative court, but did not remain in VJC. Judge Ross was the judge assigned to VJC, but he did not make any decisions in the case at issue.

APPEAL OF CRIMINAL JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Feb-22-2017 Continued To Jun-09-17 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 622

Request For Appointment Of Counsel
Off Calendar Apr-27-2016 Granted Per Written Order
